A.evidence: Faithful prose and clean markdown with good LaTeX. Author block slightly scrambled (Ajay Jain split, stray 'Logo' artifact). Table 1 rendered as markdown, Table 2 merged/truncated. Eq (13) cases block malformed ('if x1'); several display equations lack numbers but content is correct.

B.evidence: Cleanest text with faithful prose, clean author block, correct numbered LaTeX equations, and reference cross-ref anchors (harmless noise). Algorithms 1 and 2 crammed into a single running paragraph (minor structure demerit). Table 1 caption reached cleanly.

C.evidence: Prose is faithful and loop-free, but nearly all equations dropped as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' (eqs 1-3,5-13). Author block scrambled (Pieter Abbeel placed mid-document as a section header). Table 1 badly jumbled/merged.

D.evidence: Catastrophically broken: <|LOC_..|> coordinate tokens throughout the author/header block plus a massive loop of equation numbers (1) through (600+) filling hundreds of lines. Sampling equation has a sign error. Prose fragments survive but content is buried in garbage.

E.evidence: Clean, faithful prose and well-formed LaTeX, complete through the Experiments section with no LOC tokens or loops. Dropped Table 1 and Table 2 entirely (jumps from 3.4 straight into training text). Minor math slips: bracket misplacement in eqs 9-10, occasional alpha vs alpha-bar.

F.evidence: Prose largely intact and covers many pages, but math is catastrophic: long loops of '~ ~ ~' and '* * *' placeholder glyphs replace equation content. Table 1/2 content present but duplicated and jumbled; multiple duplicated blocks.

G.evidence: Excellent and faithful: clean prose, correct numbered LaTeX equations, Figure 2 rendered as a formula, and well-formed HTML tables for the author block and Algorithms 1/2. Best overall structure; Table 1 begins cleanly.

H.evidence: Prose faithful and eqs 1-13 present in good LaTeX, but a raw JSON dump of bbox/category/text layout objects leaks into the entire lower half of the page. Eq (10) duplicated, eq (5) misplaced right after eq (4). Minor typos (pabeel@, wrong GitHub URL).
